home.about_text:
At Your Energy Best, we believe in empowering homeowners to make a lasting impact on their finances and the planet. Founded by David West, our mission is simple: to provide you with the best solar experience possible, tailored to your home, your goals, and your future.
David West, the founder and driving force behind Your Energy Best, has always been inspired by the natural world. A Colorado native and UCLA graduate (Go Bruins!), David left a promising career in oil and gas engineering in 2021 to align his passion for the environment with his work. As an outdoor enthusiast\u2014surfing, skiing, skydiving, and climbing are just a few of his adventures. We thrive on connecting with people while driving positive change. The health of our world is paramount to him so every step made in the solar industry is meant to help Mother Nature in the short term, and long term. 

Here’s what sets us apart:

☀️Personalized Solar Solutions: We don’t believe in one-size-fits-all. Every home is unique, and we work to design the ideal solar system for your specific needs, ensuring maximum savings and a top-tier experience

☀️ Top Tier Quality: We partner with the best installers in your area, delivering reliable systems with exceptional craftsmanship. And you get to select and review which one you go with. The better the install, the better your long-term experience.

☀️ Environment First Mindset: By switching to solar, you’re reducing your carbon footprint and contributing to a cleaner, greener planet. The better experience you have, the more people that will want to go solar and the better the planet we have.

☀️ Client-first Approach: Your satisfaction is our priority. We focus on transparency, trust, and ongoing support to make your transition to solar seamless and stress-free. You’ll save time and money with our up-front honest recommendations.

When you choose Your Energy Best, choosing a partner who values your goals and shares your commitment to sustainability. Let us help you put more money in your back pocket with renewable energy, unlock a seamless sales to operation experience, and leave a lasting impact on the world
home.referral_text: Know someone who'd benefit from solar? Refer a friend and earn a reward when they install. Ask us how.

items.name: Mckay Hyde
items.text: David was an absolute professional. He knew the solar industry in and out! He was able to help me understand what option would be best for my family. He so evidently cares about taking care of his clients. He consistently will check in, and is always willing to jump on a call if I have any questions. I’ve had my system for 3 years and have had ZERO issues! My payments are exactly what he said they would be. Fixed and predictable. Do yourself a favor and don’t waste your time. David is your guy. I researched every company under the sun. He leads with transparency, and integrity. You will have exceptional service at a fair price. Install was professional, and equipment is high quality! I will continue to refer him to everyone I know.

items.name: Patti Smiley
items.text: I highly recommend Dave West for solar! After my experience with 6 other companies, Dave came through with consistent, caring and quick service. Roof prep and panel installation were much quicker than I expected and follow-up was a fine bonus. Dave is the 'real deal' with no B.S. promises that he can't keep.

items.name: Stephen Bell
items.text: David is conscientious, knowledgeable and honest. He knows Solar. If an analysis concludes solar installation makes sense for you, David can get it done. I installed solar with David in 2021. He has since met annually with me to analyze the performance of the system.

items.name: Sherry Jarrett
items.text: I'm so happy to share my experience with David. First because of his personal integrity and authenticity. I'm 76 and Favis took extra time to be sure that I understood everything about the decision I was making. After the installation he.remained in touch to be assured that everything was going well. Thank you David.

items.name: Olive & Richard Street
items.text: After researching Solar for three years and getting bad offers we finally have solar on our house. David gave us the very best deal and we are extremely happy with the installation, operation, and great performance of our solar system. Basically during the day our electric is off the grid and at night on the Tesla battery storage. We love it and have highly recommended it to everyone. We now sell back surplus electricity every day to SDGE. The best and simplest system.

items.name: Tiffany Elliott
items.text: I can’t say enough good things about David and Aloha. It was a pleasure working with him. He was so helpful; and available to us every step of the way. Such a great guy! Cannot recommend anyone more highly than I recommend him! He’s VERY competent and sooo helpful!!

items.name: Ed Rose
items.text: David is great, always has the answers or will get them for you. He did two projects for me, very satisfied.

items.name: John Lahman
items.text:
David West is the most dedicated SOLAR REP you could find. He was straightforward and laser focused in matching my intentions with solar capacities.
Beyond his strong university education credentials, I find him wholly dedicated to the SOLAR INDUSTRY. His mindset is doing things right for the customer.
I recommend David without reservation.
John L.

faq.question: How much does solar cost?
faq.answer: With $0 down financing, there's no upfront cost. You pay a fixed monthly amount that is typically lower than your current electricity bill — and you lock in your rate for 25 years.

faq.question: How long does installation take?
faq.answer: Most residential installations are completed in 1–3 days once permits are approved. We handle the entire design and permitting process for you, which typically takes 2–4 weeks.

faq.question: What if my roof isn't ideal for solar?
faq.answer: We perform a thorough site assessment before recommending anything. If your roof isn't a great fit, we'll let you know honestly — we never push a system that won't deliver real savings. And if it makes sense, we can handle your roof too!

faq.question: What about tax credits or rebates?
faq.answer: There is currently a 30% federal credit available on solar installations until the end of 2027. Additionally, San Diego Community Power offers battery-specific rebates — funds are limited, so we recommend applying soon. We walk you through every incentive you qualify for.

faq.question: What happens during a power outage?
faq.answer: If you have a battery backup system (like Tesla Powerwall or Enphase), your home stays powered during outages using stored solar energy. We can design your system to prioritize your most essential appliances.

rebate_alert.heading: Limited funds available for battery rebates & credits
rebate_alert.text: Apply as soon as possible before they expire to see if you qualify. San Diego Community Power currently offers upfront rebates of $250–$500 per kWh on new battery installations, plus ongoing performance incentives — but funds are limited and availability is not guaranteed.

hero.title: Unlock Your Potential Through Door-to-Door Sales
hero.subtitle: Join Southern California’s elite sales team. Solar & HVAC solutions that change lives - starting with yours. Build the income, freedom, and future you've been working toward.

build.section_text:
Sales is more than closing deals. It's about personal growth, financial freedom, and making a real impact in your community.
Door to door is one of the best ways to accelerate your potential because everything you do to better yourself betters your performance.

benefits.title: Elite Income
benefits.text:
$6,000–$10,000 in 10 days
Create six-figure earning potential without being locked into year-round burnout. Our blitz model lets you compress income, then reclaim your time.

benefits.title: Work That Fuels Your Life
benefits.text: This isn’t just about knocking doors. It’s about building a career that supports surfing, skiing, travel, health, and freedom for the things you love.

benefits.title: Leadership-Level Sales Training
benefits.text: Daily training focused on communication, confidence, and leadership, not just scripts. You leave stronger as a salesperson and as a person.

benefits.title: High-integrity, High-performance
benefits.text: We focus on delivering the best customer experience in Southern California, with integrity-based systems that create long-term success and referrals.

benefits.title: Multiple Verticals
benefits.text:
Solar, Battery, HVAC (and more)
Train across multiple verticals so you’re never dependent on one product, one incentive, or one market condition.

benefits.title: Community
benefits.text: Build with a team of like-minded individuals with a focus on how to make the most out of life and give back to the communities around us.
